docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $876.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, REAGAN AS TO DEFENDANT SEARCHLIGHT LENDING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
